blocks.text: 今回は、たまたま調子悪かっただけだからな!
blocks.translation: This time, I just happened to be in a bad mood!

blocks.text: さてと、こうなると、今度はまた新しい噛ませ犬を探さないとね...。
blocks.translation: Well, now I have to find a new punching bag...

blocks.text: さあて、どういう戦法で行こうかなあ。 え?あ、あ、あぶね!あ、あわわっべぇ・・・
blocks.translation: Now, what strategy should I use? Eh? Ah, ah, that's close! Ah, ah, ah...

blocks.text: へへっ、そうこなくっちゃ。

blocks.text: いや、えおい、まままままて・・・、うわああっ! みみみ水?

blocks.translation: Bonjour!

blocks.text: おい!?ちょっと!?

blocks.text: なんだよ。 アイツらだけで盛り上がっちゃってさ。 ホントだったら上手いことやってさ、

blocks.text: 初瀬ちゃん気合入ってんねー。 そんじゃ俺も負けずに、っと。

おいしいロックシードをあっげるよー!

blocks.text: 別に・・・お、俺は、馴れ合いたいわけじゃなくて･･･その成り行きで…。 仕方なく・・・。
blocks.translation: It's not like I wanted to get close to her... it just happened that way... I had no choice...

blocks.text: もうこんな茶番ウンザリなんだよ! 本物本物うるせえしよ! ああそうだよ!
blocks.translation: I'm sick of this farce! Shut up, it's real! That's right!

blocks.text: な、なんだよ。 この、黙ってる奴だけがかっこ悪いみたいな流れは。

blocks.text: どうしちゃったんだよ・・・ 俺!

blocks.text: うわあーっ!

blocks.translation: But you're quite the strategist, pretending to be an ally and getting close to the enemy.

blocks.text: あー! おりゃー!!
blocks.translation: Ah! Here we go!!

blocks.text: まあ、確かに、俺はまだマシですよ。 こうして、手を動かす仕事がある分だけ・・・。
blocks.translation: Well, it's true that I'm still better off than the others. At least I have work that requires me to use my hands like this.

blocks.text:
パティシエ･･･なめんなよ? こんな時のために鍛え直されてきたんだよ。俺は。
お前も案外策士だなあ。
blocks.translation:
Don't underestimate me, pastry chef. I've been retrained for times like this. I am.
You're surprisingly good at strategizing, aren't you?

blocks.text: でも・・・呉島光実。 あいつ、どうするんですかね、これから。
blocks.translation: But... Mitsumi Kureshima. I wonder what he'll do from now on.

blocks.text: いや、おしまいってわけにはいかないでしょ。
blocks.translation: No, it can't be the end.

blocks.text: めちゃ・・・ダメだ・・・!
blocks.translation: This is so... no good...!

blocks.text: こっちは散々迷惑かけられたんだ。 なんか、こう言う事、 あるんじゃねえの?
blocks.translation: I've been inconvenienced a lot. Isn't it something like this?

blocks.text: お店来るなんて久し振りじゃないですか。 あ、心配なんて無用ですよ。
blocks.translation: It's been a while since you last came to the store. Oh, there's no need to worry.

blocks.text: これは・・・ありがとう、 初瀬ちゃん・・・。
blocks.translation: This is... thank you, Hatsuse-chan...

blocks.text:
俺は、スイーツ界のスターですから。 いつか、弟子は師匠を超えちゃうもんなんですね。
ちょっと早すぎたかー?ははは。
blocks.translation:
I'm a star in the sweets world. Someday, an apprentice will surpass his master. 
Maybe it's a little too early? Hahaha.

blocks.text: 初めてグリドンがパワーアップした･･･。 こいつなら･･･いける!
blocks.translation: Gridon has been powered up for the first time... This guy... can do it!

blocks.text: なんかキメ台詞言わないとな･･･最高のスイーツに、酔わせてやるぜ。
blocks.translation: I need to say something catchy... I'll get you drunk on the best sweets.

blocks.text: 師匠!? ななな何するんですか!?
blocks.translation: Master!? What are you doing!?

blocks.text: 目を醒ましてください! 師匠!
blocks.translation: Wake up, Master!

blocks.text: カッコ悪すぎですよ! 俺の人気を妬んで、 こんなことするなんて!
blocks.translation: That's so uncool! To do something like this because you're jealous of my popularity!

blocks.text: うわあああああああ!
blocks.translation: Whaa ...

blocks.text: 俺はもう戦いなんて･･･ あんなヘナチョコだったあの頃から・・・ 俺は俺で頑張ってきたんだ･･･。
blocks.translation: I don't want to fight anymore... Even back then when I was such a wimp... I've been working hard on my own...

blocks.text: 師匠! 大丈夫ですか!
blocks.translation: Master! Are you okay?

blocks.text: 師匠! あんたは俺が救ってみせる! 変身!
blocks.translation: Master! I'll save you! Transform!

blocks.text: 無茶しないでくださいよ。
blocks.translation: Don't do anything reckless.

blocks.text: くっそー、俺は昔のままの俺じゃない!
blocks.translation: Damn, I'm not the same person I used to be!

blocks.text: 師匠。
blocks.translation: Master.

blocks.text: 師匠! あんたは俺が知ってる中で一番強い男だ! なんだかわかんないような奴に
blocks.translation: Master! You're the strongest man I know!

blocks.text: 18 店に戻ってきてください。
blocks.translation: 18 Please come back to the store.

blocks.text: 操られるような男じゃない。 アンタは、 男の中の漢なんだー!
blocks.translation: You're not the kind of man to be manipulated. You're a real man!

blocks.text: また一から、もう一度修行したいんです!
blocks.translation: I want to start training again from scratch!

blocks.text:
ヘルヘイムの実･･･ もしかして!・・・変わらない・・・だめか･･･ くっそ･･･ こうなったら...。
初瀬ちゃん…なんで?
blocks.translation:
The fruit of Helheim... Perhaps!... It won't change... No good... Damn... If it's come to this...
Hatsuse-chan... why?

blocks.text: ありがとうございます!
blocks.translation: thank you!

blocks.text: えええ・・・えー••• うおおおおお!
blocks.translation: Yeah.....uh....Whoaaa!

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 甘ったれんじゃないわよ! そうやって気安く人前に立つなって言ってんの!
blocks.translation: Don't be so spoiled! I'm telling you not to act so carefree in front of others!

blocks.text: そうよ。 私こそが本物のプロフェッショナルよ。
blocks.translation: Yes, I am a true professional.

blocks.text: パティシエとお呼びなさい!
blocks.translation: Call me Patissier!

blocks.text: だまらっしゃい!
blocks.translation: Don't be fooled!

blocks.text: アナタ誕生日は? フッ、水瓶座ね。 ワテクシとは相性最悪一。 おまけにエスプリに乏しい受け答え、
blocks.translation: What's your birthday? Ha, you're an Aquarius. You and I have the worst compatibility. Plus, your responses lack wit.

blocks.text: あー! アマチュア風情がよくも・・・。
blocks.translation: Ah! How amateurish of you to do that...

blocks.text: エレガンスのカケラもないファッションセンス。ノンノンノン。 アナタ不採用。
blocks.translation: Your fashion sense lacks any semblance of elegance. No no no. You're not hired.

blocks.text: あらいけない! パイ生地が焼き上がる時間だわ! 覚えておきなさい!
blocks.translation: Oh no! It's time for the pie crust to bake! Remember that!

blocks.text: その短絡的な発想が! すでにアナタの貧困な感性を物語っているの!
blocks.translation: That short-sighted thinking already speaks volumes about your poor sensibility!

blocks.text: あー痛い、痛い痛い・・・これで勝ったと、思わないことねー!
blocks.translation: Ah, it hurts, it hurts, it hurts... I don't think I've won yet!

blocks.text: 素材人材すべてにおいて本物の一品を揃えること。 それが当店の揺るがぬポリスィー。
blocks.translation: Our unwavering policy is to stock only the finest quality ingredients and human resources.

blocks.text: ちょっとお待ちなさい! さいさい…。 こんな楽しそうなイベントにワテクシを呼ばないとは、一体どういうことかしら?
blocks.translation: Wait a minute! Wait a minute... Why on earth wouldn't you invite me to such a fun-looking event?

blocks.text: 本物を知りたいのなら、もっと男を磨いてから出直していらっしゃい。 アデュー!
blocks.translation: If you want to know the real deal, come back after you've polished yourself up as a man. Adieu!

blocks.text: 22 ホッホッホッホッホッホッ、オッホッホッホッホッホッ、 お先にー。スパード坊や。
blocks.translation: 22 Ho ho ho ho ho ho, oh ho ho ho ho ho, go ahead, little Spad.

blocks.text: 呆れたわねー。 本当に素人のケンカじゃない。 近頃の子どもたちはこんな茶番を見て
blocks.translation: I'm shocked. This is no amateur fight. Kids these days are shocked by this farce.

blocks.text: こんな面白くもないルールよりも、二人で楽しみましょう。 ムッシュ、バナーヌ?
blocks.translation: Let's have fun together, rather than follow these boring rules. Monsieur, Banane?

blocks.text: 喜んでるの? なにもかもニセモノ。 アマチュアのごっこ遊び。 まがい物は本物の輝きを曇らせる。
blocks.translation: Are you happy? It's all fake. Amateur play. The fakes tarnish the shine of the real thing.

blocks.text: いいこと?クリスマスってのはね、パティシエにとって一年で一番忙しい時なの。
blocks.translation: Good thing? Christmas is the busiest time of the year for pastry chefs.

blocks.text: このままでは世間が本物のパッションを忘れてしまうわ! 放っておけないわね。
blocks.translation: If things continue like this, the world will forget what true passion is! We can't just leave it like this.

blocks.text: あら、してるわよ! まずはバナーナの下ごしらえ。 全部むいて、 丸裸にしてあげるわー!
blocks.translation: Oh, yes, I am! First I'll prepare the banana. I'll peel it all and leave it completely naked!

blocks.text: 誰かが本物の戦場、本物のバトルというものを見せつけてあげないと。
blocks.translation: Someone has to show us what a real battlefield, a real battle, is.

blocks.text: 26 あらスペール。 ずいぶんと鍛え直してきたわね。 ご褒美にマンゴープリンにしてあげるわ!
blocks.translation: 26 Oh Sperl. You've really worked hard to get better. I'll treat you to some mango pudding!

blocks.text: ワテクシがギャラリーの皆様をお招きしましたの。 記念すべき初舞台ですものね。
blocks.translation: I invited everyone in the gallery to join me, as this is a memorable debut performance.

blocks.text: トレビアーン! なんて美しい。 戦場に咲く白い花、あるいは泉に舞い降りた白鳥。 ああ、 あなたは一体・・・?
blocks.translation: Trevian! How beautiful. Like white flowers blooming on the battlefield, or a swan alighting on a fountain. Ah, who are you...?

blocks.text:
ワテクシはアナタたちのくだらないお遊戯に新たなる風雲を呼び起こす者。 凰蓮・ピエール・アルフォンソ。
さあ始めますわよ。 破壊と暴力のパジェントを!
blocks.translation: I am the one who will bring new storms to your silly games. My name is Ou Ren Pierre Alfonso. Let the pageant of destruction and violence begin!

blocks.text: ああ、いい一･･･。 せめてお名前を･･･。
blocks.translation: Ah, that's good... At least tell me your name...

blocks.text: で?アタ誕生日は? 乙女座一! あらそう! ちょっと頼りない気もするけれど、
blocks.translation: So, what's my birthday? I'm a Virgo! Oh really! I feel like I'm a little unreliable, but...

blocks.text:
古来より戦いとは、エンターテイメント! 時のローマ皇帝はコロシアムで剣闘士を戦わせ、
市民に娯楽の興奮を提供したものよ! 今からここで、 最高のショーを披露してあげるわ!
blocks.translation:
Since ancient times, fighting has been a form of entertainment! The Roman emperors of the time had gladiators fight in the Colosseum,
providing exciting entertainment for the citizens! Now, I'll give you the best show ever!

blocks.text: 鍛え方次第によっては、 んーどうにかなるかもね!
blocks.translation: Depending on how you train, maybe it will work!

blocks.text: セボン! ハイ! ハイ! ハイ!
blocks.translation: Sebon! Yes! Yes! Yes!

blocks.text: なんて貧弱。 これが本当の戦場なら、5秒で袋詰めよ? アナタ?
blocks.translation: How pathetic. If this was a real battlefield, I'd be bagged in five seconds, you know?

blocks.text:
プロの世界のエンターテイメントは残酷なの。プレイヤーはすべて血に飢えた観客たちへの
供物! そこがアマチュアのお遊びとのちがい!
blocks.translation: Professional entertainment is brutal. Players are sacrifices to the bloodthirsty spectators! That's what makes it different from amateur entertainment!

blocks.text:
すっとぼけてるんじゃないわよ! 気合を入れて混ぜなさい! モタモタしてると固まるだろうが!ほら急げ!
もうまるっきり悪役のセリフね。 ムッシュバナーヌ。
blocks.translation:
Don't play dumb! Mix it with all your might! If you hesitate it will harden! Come on, hurry up!
That's definitely something a villain would say, Monsieur Banane.

blocks.text: アナタたちとは、鍛え方が違いましてよ?
blocks.translation: My training method is different from yours, you know?

blocks.text: なかなか美しいじゃない。 アマチュアにしては、上出来よ。 でも気をつけなさい。 美しさと脆さは紙一重!
blocks.translation: It's quite beautiful. For an amateur, it's a good job. But be careful. There's a fine line between beauty and fragility!

blocks.text: あなた見どころありそうね。鍛え直してまた出直していらっしゃい。 サリュー!
blocks.translation: You seem to have something to offer. Train hard and come back again. Salyu!

blocks.text: 芸術は、選りすぐりの本物だけを残していかなきゃ。
blocks.translation: When it comes to art, we need to preserve only the finest, most authentic pieces.

blocks.text: アータたちのようなニセモノを誰もが放っておくから、文化が廃れてしまうのよ!
blocks.translation: If everyone allows fakes like Arta and the others to live their lives, culture will die out!

blocks.text:
ワテクシは凰蓮・ピエール・アルフォンゾ。 またの名を、正義の味方、 アーマードライダー、ブラーボ!
ボンソワール! 沢芽市の皆様、 危険な怪物の跳梁跋扈に、不安な夜をお過ごしかと存じます。
全ては嘆かわしく愚かな子供たち、ビートライダーズの仕業なのです。 ですが、ご安心を。
これからはワテクシ、ブラーボが街の平和を守って差し上げますわ。 もちろん、子供たちは
ワテクシが厳しい指導によってキッチリと躾け直します。 既にビートライダーズのリーダーが
一人、ワテクシの元で立派に更生しつつありますの。 オルポワール。
blocks.translation:
I am Ouren Pierre Alfonso. Also known as the ally of justice, Armored Rider Bravo!
Bonsoir! Everyone in Zawame City, I'm sure you're spending anxious nights as dangerous monsters run rampant.
It's all the work of those deplorable and foolish children, the Beat Riders. But rest assured.
From now on, I, Bravo, will protect the peace of the city. Of course, I will provide strict guidance and proper discipline to the children. One of the Beat Riders' leaders has already been successfully reformed under my tutelage. Orpoire.

blocks.text: 台同
blocks.translation: Taitong

blocks.text: 台同
blocks.translation: Taitong

blocks.text: ボンジュール、モンダリン、いつぞやの借りを返しに、来たわよ!
blocks.translation: Bonjour, Mondarin, I've come to repay a debt I owed you some time ago!

blocks.text: もう、困った子ね。 えっ? ボウヤ・・・ ボウヤー!?
blocks.translation: What a troublesome kid. Huh? Boy... Boy!?

blocks.text: あのね、 怪物退治なんて契約には含まれてないの。 余計なことに手を出して本来の依頼を
blocks.translation: You see, monster extermination isn't included in the contract. I'm getting involved in unnecessary things and forgetting about the original request.

blocks.text: まったく、アータってホントのホントにバカね。 あんな無茶するなんて。 ... でも、なかなか素敵だったわ。
blocks.translation: Honestly, Arta is really, really stupid. To do something so reckless... But it was pretty cool.

blocks.text: おろそかにするなんて、プロにあるまじき失態だわっ!
blocks.translation: Neglecting it is an unprofessional blunder!

blocks.text: アータもどうやら一皮むけたようね。 ちょっとだけ認めてあげてもよろしくてよ。 ボウヤ。
blocks.translation: It seems like you've grown a bit, too. I hope you'll give yourself a little recognition, boy.

blocks.text: 行くわよー!
blocks.translation: Let's go!

blocks.text: あーーー! 麗しの白いお方! なんか以前よりも逞しくなってて、ス・テ・キ!
blocks.translation: Ahhh! What a beautiful white lady! She looks even stronger than before, it's amazing!

blocks.text: ちょ・・・ 調子に乗ってんじゃ、ないわよ!
blocks.translation: Hey... Don't get too cocky!

blocks.text: あ・・・･ウィームッシュ!
blocks.translation: Ah... Wee Mush!

blocks.text: ここは一時撤退よ! ムースの仕込みもしなくっちゃ!
blocks.translation: Let's retreat for now! We need to prepare the mousse!

blocks.text: ジュテー
blocks.translation: Jetée

blocks.text: ・ム!よかった...。
blocks.translation: ・Hmm! That's good...

blocks.text: まったく、あの子もまだまだ教育が足りないわね。 ロックシードをすり替えておいて正解だったわ。
blocks.translation: Honestly, that child still needs more education. It was a good idea to switch the Lockseed.

blocks.text: いいえ、ワテクシ本望ですわ。 これでようやくアナタの腕の中に…。
blocks.translation: No, it's my wish. Now I can finally be in your arms...

blocks.text:
当店のスイーツを堪能して下さっているお客様には、万が一にも失礼があってはならないわ。
ワテクシのミッションは戦極ドライバーの回収! ボウヤがきちんとこの場に持ってきた時点で、
blocks.translation:
I must not be rude to our customers who are enjoying our sweets.
My mission is to retrieve the Sengoku Driver! Once the boy has brought it here,

blocks.text: ぼーっとしてんじゃないわよ。 いい大人のくせに、こんな子供たちだけに戦わせておくつもり?
blocks.translation: Don't just sit there and do nothing. You're a grown-up, but are you going to let these kids fight alone?

blocks.text: そうよねえ。ノンギャラで戦うなんてアマチュアの極み。 ただ負けたくないってだけの幼稚な
blocks.translation: That's right. Fighting without pay is the height of amateurism. It's just childish and you don't want to lose.

blocks.text: 後は力ずくで奪い取れば済む話でしょ。
blocks.translation: All that's left is to take it by force.

blocks.text: ポリシー。 でもそれはそれで、見守ってあげたくなっちゃうのよねえ。
blocks.translation: That's a policy, but it makes me want to keep an eye on them.

blocks.text: ホッホッホッホッホ これがワテクシの仕事の流儀。
blocks.translation: Ho ho ho ho ho, this is how I work.

blocks.text: 理にかなった作戦ね。 よろしくてよ。
blocks.translation: Sounds like a sensible plan. I'm happy with it.

blocks.text: あとはアータ次第よ? 水瓶座のボウヤ。 大人しくベルトを差し出すか、
blocks.translation: The rest is up to you, Aquarius Boy. You can either quietly hand over your belt, or

blocks.text: 粘りに粘って・・・チャンスを待つの!
blocks.translation: Be persistent and wait for your chance!

blocks.text: ケガをしてから差し出すか、好きな方を選びなさい。
blocks.translation: Get hurt and then offer it up, or choose whichever you prefer.

blocks.text: コイツはニセモノよ! コイツにはエレガンスが欠けてる!ワテクシの目は誤魔化せないわ!
blocks.translation: This one's fake! It lacks elegance! You can't fool my eyes!

blocks.text: これまではいつも二人がかりでワテクシと張り合ってきたくせに、
blocks.translation: Up until now, they've always been competing with me together,

blocks.text: メロンの君を騙るなんて不届き者!許せないわー。
blocks.translation: How dare you deceive Melon-kun! I can't forgive you.

blocks.text: たった一人で勝ち目があるとでも!?
blocks.translation: Do you think you have a chance of winning alone?

blocks.text: まったく、とことん面倒な子たちね。
blocks.translation: Truly, they are such troublesome children.

blocks.text: バカモーーーン! さぼってんじゃないわよ!
blocks.translation: You idiot! Don't slack off!

blocks.text: ここはワテクシたちが足止めするわ! さ! 早くお行きなさい!アータたちがさっさといなくなれば、
blocks.translation: We'll hold you back here! Come on! Go quickly! Once Arta and the others are gone,

blocks.text: ここはワテクシのステージよ。
blocks.translation: This is my stage.

blocks.text: それだけ早くワテクシたちも逃げられるの! 早く行きなさい!
blocks.translation: That's how quickly we can escape! Go quickly!

blocks.text: オッホッホッホッホッホ! たーんとしぼって、あ・げ・る。
blocks.translation: Ohohohohoho! Squeeze it tightly and give it to you.

blocks.text: ここが根性の見せ所よボウヤ。 気合いれて行くわよ!!
blocks.translation: This is where you need to show your guts, boy. Let's go with all our might!!

blocks.text: パーティシーエたーいりょーくきーほんだよー
blocks.translation: Party C-E-Taiyo Kikihon

blocks.text: ワテクシもいるわよ、ニセモノボウヤ。
blocks.translation: There's me too, fake boy.

blocks.text: ハイハイハイハイハイ! 登れー! 登れオラー! ハイおいで! おいで! さあ! さあ!
blocks.translation: Hey, hey, hey, hey! Climb! Climb! Come on! Come on! Come on!

blocks.text: フフフフフ。 さあ、 メロンの君の仇討ちよ!
blocks.translation: Hehehehe. Now, let's avenge Melon-kun!

blocks.text:
アーアアー!ハイ! ハイ! ハイ! ホレホレ! ハッ! さー、ぼうや! ワテクシをつかまえてごらーん!
ハハー! アハハハー! アハハハー! オッケー! アハッ!
blocks.translation:
Aaaah! Yes! Yes! Yes! Look here! Ha! Now, boy! Try and catch me!
Haha! Ahahaha! Ahahaha! Okay! Ahaha!

blocks.text: キツいお仕置きが必要みたいね。
blocks.translation: Looks like you need a severe punishment.

blocks.text: 戦場ではアンタのような人間をたくさん見てきたわ。 力に溺れたわね。
blocks.translation: I've seen many people like you on the battlefield, obsessed with power.

blocks.text: いい? 本物になりたければ強いだけじゃダメ! なによりもそう、 美しくないと。
blocks.translation: OK, if you want to be the real deal, you can't just be strong! Above all, you have to be beautiful.

blocks.text: おどき! 自分たちが何をしてるか、分かってんの!?
blocks.translation: Damn! Do you know what you're doing?

blocks.text: 違う! もっとこう、エレガントに、うっふーん。 ハイ!
blocks.translation: No! It's more elegant, hmm. Yes!

blocks.text: ザック! どういうつもり!?
blocks.translation: Zack! What are you doing?

blocks.text: 違う! もっとこう、ビューティフルに、あはーん。 違う!違う!!
blocks.translation: No! It's more like, beautiful, ahaha. No! No!!

blocks.text: アイツは最初に人類を裏切ったの。 今のアナタは正義の味方よ。
blocks.translation: He was the first to betray humanity. Now you are a champion of justice.

blocks.text: 53 泣いてる場合じゃないわ。 もう一度最初からいくわよ。
blocks.translation: 53 This is no time to cry. Let's start again from the beginning.

blocks.text: この街を故郷だと思ってる人たちが、これだけ大勢いたってことよね。
blocks.translation: There are so many people who consider this city their home.

blocks.text: どうしたの? この程度でネを上げてちゃ、 本物にはなれないわよ。
blocks.translation: What's wrong? If you keep getting angry at things like this, you'll never be the real deal.

blocks.text: ユグドラシルが無くなっても、ちゃんと帰ってきてくれる
blocks.translation: Even if Yggdrasil disappears, it will come back.

blocks.text:
アータって、ホンットにバカね・・・。 やりたいことがハッキリしてないなんて、 当たり前じゃない。
それはそうと水瓶座のボウヤ。 ウチの子をまた不良の道に引きずり込む気ね。 いいこと。
blocks.translation:
You're such an idiot... It's no wonder you're not even sure what you want to do. 
By the way, your Aquarius son is going to drag my son down the path of delinquency again. Good thing.

blocks.text: 考えたって仕方ないことよりも、今やらなきゃいけないことにちゃんと目を向けなさい。
blocks.translation: Instead of thinking about things that won't do any good, focus on what you need to do now.

blocks.text: まだまだ世の中大変なんだから。
blocks.translation: The world is still in a difficult situation.

blocks.text: その子はね、今が一番大切な時。 本物になろうと必死に足掻いてるのよ。
blocks.translation: For this child, now is the most important time. He is desperately trying to become the real thing.

blocks.text: どうもこうもないわ。 何をやったにせよ子供だもの。 オーバーロードに騙されて利用されてた。
blocks.translation: There's nothing we can do about it. No matter what he did, he was just a child. He was deceived and used by the Overlord.

blocks.text: それをアータみたいな不良に邪魔させないわ!
blocks.translation: I won't let a delinquent like Arta get in the way of that!

blocks.text: みんなと同じ被害者。 そういう扱いでおしまいよ。
blocks.translation: A victim just like everyone else. That's how you should be treated.

blocks.text: 問答無用、 変身!
blocks.translation: No questions asked, transform!

blocks.text: そう、だからって、犯した過ちを忘れられることはできない。
blocks.translation: Yes, but that doesn't mean you can forget the mistakes you've made.

blocks.text: 素人の目は誤魔化せても、プロフェッショナルなワテクシの目は・・・あー痛い痛い痛い・・・
blocks.translation: You can fool the eyes of an amateur, but my professional eyes... oh, it hurts, it hurts, it hurts...

blocks.text:
58 誤魔化せないわ! インベスと戦ってるのはアータたちの自作自演! 図星でしょ!
ほらごらんなさい! これが動かぬ証拠よ!
blocks.translation:
58 You can't fool them! The fight against the Inves is a fabrication by Arta and the others! You're right!
Look! This is irrefutable evidence!

blocks.text:
ある意味で、一番かわいそうなのはあの子自身よ。 あの子の罪を理解して、どう償えばいいか
教えてあげられる人間が、 誰もいないっていうのはね...。
ほんとにみずくさい子ね。
blocks.translation: In a way, the person who is most pitiful is that child himself. There is no one who can understand his sins and tell him how to atone for them... He's such a shameless child.

blocks.translation:
Bravo (Gaim Gaiden ver.) / Proto Bravo Faceplate (sold separately, included with the CSM Lockseed Charmon Set)
With the Proto Bravo faceplate (sold separately) attached, briefly press the dialogue button. → Lines for Houren, Pierre, and Alfonso will be played in the order listed below.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: まさかと思って探りに来てみればこのバカ面。 もしかしてフェイク?
blocks.translation: I couldn't believe it, so I went to check it out and found this stupid face. Maybe it's fake?

blocks.text: アータ、ワタシに何か隠していない? 新しいフルーツ、とか...。
blocks.translation: Are you hiding something from me? A new fruit, maybe?

blocks.text: 新しく手に入れたフルーツってまさか!
blocks.translation: The newly acquired fruit is...

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: ウウッ･･･ウウッ･･･ ウウウウウッ・・・。
blocks.translation: Ugh... ugh... ughhhh...

blocks.text: 触らないでー!･･･このぐらい･･･全然、平気なのー!
blocks.translation: Don't touch me!... This much... I'm totally fine!

blocks.text: はっ…少しは元のアータに、戻ったみたいね!
blocks.translation: Ha... It looks like you're back to your old self a little bit!

blocks.text: ちょっとワタシにこんなもんを食べさせようっていうの!? パティシエ失格よ!
blocks.translation: You really want me to eat something like this?! You're not fit to be a pastry chef!

blocks.text: 12 お運びなさい! メルシーね。 メルシーね。
blocks.translation: 12 Carry it! Merci. Merci.

blocks.text: アーマードライダー、グリドン!?･･･アータ・・・なの?
blocks.translation: Armored Rider, Gridon!?... Arta...is that it?

blocks.text: 何かしら。
blocks.translation: Something.

blocks.text: ってなんで逃げるのよ!・・・やっぱりあの子・・・ 覚悟を･･･決めなきゃいけないのかしら。
blocks.translation: So why are you running away!... It's that girl after all... I guess I need to make up my mind...

blocks.text: もうアータのお店じゃない。
blocks.translation: It's not Arta's shop anymore.

blocks.text: あら?わからない? こういうことよ。
blocks.translation: Oh? Don't you understand? This is what I mean.

blocks.text: 言ったわね〜。 それじゃあ、アテクシが、本気で一から叩き直してあげるわ。
blocks.translation: I told you so. Then I'll seriously teach you from scratch.

blocks.text: ふっ、この期に及んで言い訳しても無駄よ! 道を誤った弟子を正すのも師匠の務め。
blocks.translation: Fu, there's no point in making excuses at this point! It's a master's duty to correct a student who has gone astray.

blocks.text: せめて楽に送ってあげる。
blocks.translation: At least I'll send it off comfortably.

blocks.text:
ふれっ!ははは。 ちょっと、しっかりなさい! じゃあまずは筋トレよ。
アテクシをおぶったまま、 お店まで、ダッシュー!
blocks.translation:
Touch! Hahaha. Hold on a bit! Let's start with some strength training.
With me on your back, dash to the store!

blocks.text: え? ええ? ちょちょちょちょっと何よこれ!? アータ、一体何するつもり!? ああ一つ、・・・うぉおおおおおおああああああっ!
blocks.translation: Huh? Huh? W-w-w-what is this!? What on earth are you planning to do!? Ah, one thing... Whoaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa!

blocks.text: 台詞ボタンの長押し プロトブラーボフェイスプレートを取り付けた状態で、台詞ボタンを長押しします。各キャラクターの台詞を掛け合わせた、全5種の会話音声が鳴ります。
blocks.translation: Press and hold the dialogue button. With the Proto Bravo faceplate attached, press and hold the dialogue button. A total of five different dialogue sounds will be played, combining the lines of each character.

blocks.text: 黒影フェイスプレート (別売り・今後発売予定)
blocks.translation: Kurokage faceplate (sold separately, to be released in the future)

blocks.text: 別売りの黒影フェイスプレートを取り付けた状態で、台詞ボタンを短押しします。 初瀬亮二の台詞が下記リストの順に鳴ります。
blocks.translation: With the separately sold Kurokage faceplate attached, press the dialogue button briefly. Ryoji Hatsuse's lines will be played in the order listed below.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 1 俺は、アーマードライダー、黒影。 そしてコイツは、グリドン。
blocks.translation: 1 I am the Armored Rider, Kurokage. And this guy is Gridon.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: なんだお前ら! 見せもんじゃねえぞ!
blocks.translation: What's up with you guys? This is no show!

blocks.text: ようはケンカ売られてるってことだよな? だったら買うぜ!行けー! グリドン!
blocks.translation: So basically, they're challenging me to a fight, right? Well then, I'll buy it! Go! Gridon!

blocks.text: いいだろグリドンで・・・。
blocks.translation: That's fine, Gridon...

blocks.text: テメエの言う通り、こっから先は仕切り直しだ!
blocks.translation: Like you said, we have to start over from here on out!

blocks.text: 10 おいグリドーン! おいグリドンチームワークだ! 痛って・・・おいグリドーン!
blocks.translation: 10 Hey, Gridon! Hey, Gridon, teamwork! Ouch... Hey, Gridon!

blocks.text: そのベルトをぶち砕いて、二度と変身できなくしてやるぜ。
blocks.translation: I'll smash that belt and make sure you can never transform again.

blocks.text: 痛い! このやろー … うわっ、なにしやがる!?
blocks.translation: Ouch! You bastard... Whoa, what are you doing!?

blocks.text: 覚えてやがれ!
blocks.translation: Remember that!

blocks.text: 12 城之内! 行くぞ!
blocks.translation: 12 Jonouchi! Let's go!

blocks.text: ここなら誰の邪魔も入らねえだろう。
blocks.translation: No one will get in our way here.

blocks.text: アーマードライダー黒影! この勝負に勝って必ずランキングトップになってやるぜ!
blocks.translation: Armored Rider Kurokage! I'll win this match and definitely become the top of the rankings!

blocks.text: 俺の立てた作戦はこうだ。 まずはお前が先に立って敵を威嚇する。 そして、敵に十分
blocks.translation: Here's the plan I came up with. First, you take the lead and intimidate the enemy. Then,

blocks.text: おいグリドン、なにをモタモタやってやがる!
blocks.translation: Hey Gridon, what are you doing here?

blocks.text: 近づいたところで、 お前が仕掛けると見せかけて･･･。 俺が槍で一撃! とあ! どうだ。
blocks.translation: As I got closer, you pretended to attack... and then I hit him with my spear! Ah! See?

blocks.text: はー、やっぱグリドン頭いいなー。
blocks.translation: Wow, Gridon really is smart.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: そういうこと。
blocks.translation: That's it.

blocks.text: なんで今になって俺たちに挑戦を? バロンの標的は鎧武じゃなかったのか?
blocks.translation: Why are you challenging us now? Wasn't Gaim Baron's target?

blocks.text: 抜き足差し足、忍び足・・・うらぁ!
blocks.translation: Sneaking, sneaking, sneaking...Urgh!
...! ...If that's the case...!

blocks.text: そんなの関係ねえ。 今度こそ引導を渡してやるぜ! うらぁ!
blocks.translation: That doesn't matter. This time I'll give you the final push! Ugh!

blocks.text: オイ、グリドンはどうした。 黙って見てるだけか!?チームワークはどうなったんだよ!
blocks.translation: Hey, what happened to Gridon? Are you just watching silently? What happened to your teamwork?

blocks.text: おい! 俺は、どうすればいい?
blocks.translation: Hey! What should I do?

blocks.text: は…? 城之内･･･お前･･･。
blocks.translation: Huh...? Jonouchi... you...

blocks.text: 許せねえ! 俺はこのままじゃただの雑魚だ!
blocks.translation: I can't forgive this! If I keep going like this I'll just be a worthless fry!

blocks.text: オイ、 お前らどこ行くんだ!? おい!!
blocks.translation: Hey, where are you guys going!? Hey!!

blocks.text: おお、グッドアイデア! 行ってくるぜ!
blocks.translation: Oh, great idea! I'm off!

blocks.text: なんで、俺が怯えなきゃならねえんだよあんなヤツクソクソクソお・・・。
blocks.translation: Why do I have to be scared of that guy, damn damn damn...

blocks.text: ・・・なんだ? 初めて見るアーマードライダーだな。 俺が戦いってもんを教えてやるよ!
blocks.translation: ...What? This is the first time I've seen an Armored Rider. I'll teach you all about fighting!

blocks.text: 力さえあれば･･･もう一度あの力さえあれば!
blocks.translation: If only I had the power... If only I had that power once more!

blocks.text: 随分と逃げ腰じゃねぇか。 ええ!? これで終わりだ! ウラァー!
blocks.translation: You're being quite hesitant. Huh?! This is the end! Hurray!

blocks.text: アイツのせいで···俺は...。
blocks.translation: Because of him...I...

blocks.text: 残念だが、俺にはある!
blocks.translation: Sadly, I have it!

blocks.text: 力･･･アイツらの力が･･･なんで俺には無いんだ…。 コイツを･･･もう一度俺に力を!
blocks.translation: Power... Their power... Why don't I have it... Give this guy... his power once more!

blocks.text: この野郎!
blocks.translation: You bastard!

blocks.translation: Press and hold the dialogue button. With the Kurokage faceplate attached, press and hold the dialogue button. A total of 10 different dialogue sounds will be played, combining the lines of each character.

blocks.text:
ナックルフェイスプレート (別売り・CSMロックシードチームバロンセット付属)
別売りのナックルフェイスプレートを取り付けた状態で、台詞ボタンを短押しします。 ザックの台詞が下記リストの順に鳴ります。
台同
1 待ってくれ! 今ここは鎧武だけのステージじゃない。 お前達だけに戦わせない!
blocks.translation:
Knuckle Faceplate (Sold Separately, Included with the CSM Lockseed Team Baron Set)
With the separately sold Knuckle Faceplate attached, briefly press the dialogue button. Zack's lines will be played in the order listed below.

1 Wait! This isn't just Gaim's stage right now. I won't let you fight alone!

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 俺のこと、味方だと思ってるヤツを、 これから裏切って罠にはめるんだぜ?
blocks.translation: I'm going to betray and trap those who think I'm on their side, you know?

blocks.text: 俺はチームバロンのリーダー、ザック! アーマードライダーナックルだ!
blocks.translation: I'm Zack, the leader of Team Baron! Armored Rider Knuckle!

blocks.text: 戒斗は、いつだってなにかと戦ってきた。 あんな力を手に入れて、 ユグドラシルも
blocks.translation: Kaito has always been fighting something. He has obtained such power, and Yggdrasil

blocks.text: 一緒に戦うぞ! インベスは任せてくれ!
blocks.translation: Let's fight together! Leave the Inves to me!

blocks.text: オーバーロードも倒した後で、 アイツが次に牙をむく相手が誰なのか、ずっとそれが心配だった
blocks.translation: After defeating Overlord, I was always worried about who he would turn his fangs on next.
Kaito...!

blocks.text: 戒斗は俺が止める。
blocks.translation: I'll stop Kaito.

blocks.text: 戒斗! 見ててくれー!
blocks.translation: Kaito! Watch over me!

blocks.text: そうまでして世界を滅ぼすことに、何の価値がある?
blocks.translation: What's the point in destroying the world like that?

blocks.text: 一緒に行くぞ! これで最後だー!
blocks.translation: Let's go together! This is the last time!

blocks.text: アンタからリーダーを引き継いで、俺は変わった。 戦う意味を、 誰かを守る誇らしさを知った。
blocks.translation: Taking over as leader from you has changed me. I've learned the meaning of fighting, and the pride of protecting someone.
Kaito...

blocks.text: だが戒斗、アンタはどうしてそうなった。 それがアンタの求めてた、強さか?
blocks.translation: But Kaito, how did you end up like this? Is that the strength you were looking for?

blocks.text: 俺達がどうにかするしかない! か･･･。 アーマードライダーは俺だけじゃない。
blocks.translation: We have no choice but to do something about this! I'm not the only Armored Rider.

blocks.text: そうか...。 結局アンタは、なにひとつ変わってないんだな。
blocks.translation: I see... So you haven't changed at all after all.

blocks.text: ミッチもいるし、紘汰だって頼めば手伝ってくれるだろ。
blocks.translation: There's Mitch, and even Kouta would help if you asked him.

blocks.text: しまった・・・。
blocks.translation: Oh no...

blocks.text: 紘汰、大変だ。 またインベスだ! 今度はただ暴れるんじゃなくて金を奪おうとしている!
blocks.translation: Kouta, this is bad. It's the Inves again! This time they're not just causing trouble, they're trying to steal money!

blocks.text: 43 オレのつとめだ!
blocks.translation: 43 It's my job!

blocks.text: こいつは誰かが錠前でコントロールしているぞ。
blocks.translation: Someone is controlling this with a lock.

blocks.text: 俺には守るものが、 ある! 犠牲を越えて、戦う価値がある!
blocks.translation: I have something to protect! It's worth fighting for, even at the cost of everything!

blocks.text: 紘汰! アイツらを追え!
blocks.translation: Kouta! Go after them!

blocks.text: うおおおおおおッ! 戒斗ォー!
blocks.translation: Woooooooo! Gaito!

blocks.text: おう。任せてくれ。
blocks.translation: Okay. Leave it to me.

blocks.text: ･･･俺が･･･最後じゃない･･･誰かが･･･また...。
blocks.translation: ...I won't be the last... Someone else will be there...

blocks.text: まあまあ落ち着こうぜ。 そう心配するなって紘汰。 この程度じゃまだまだ余裕だぜ。
blocks.translation: Come on, let's calm down. Don't worry so much, Kouta. This is still plenty.

blocks.text: ミッチ! みんな逃げろ! 数が多すぎる!
blocks.translation: Mitch! Everyone run! There are too many of them!

blocks.text: それが分かっててどうしてアイツらなんかと!
blocks.translation: Knowing that, why would you be with those guys?

blocks.text: よう! ･･･なんか、不思議なもんだな。 こうして、みんなが笑ってると、 世界のピンチなんて、
blocks.translation: Hey! It's strange. With everyone laughing like this, it doesn't seem like the world is in trouble.

blocks.text: 嘘だったみたいに思えてくる。 誰が戦って、誰が世界を救ったのか、
blocks.translation: It seems like a lie. Who fought, who saved the world?

blocks.text: ホントのところを知ってるヤツらともなれば、 それこそ･･･ 俺たちぐらいなもんだ。
blocks.translation: When it comes to people who know the truth, it's really just us.

blocks.text: お前だって、いいように利用されてるだけじゃないのか?
blocks.translation: Aren't you just being used for your own good?

blocks.text: なあ、ミッチ! だからさ! 紘汰や舞や戒斗の事、思い出して話が出来る相手ってそれだけで貴重
blocks.translation: Hey, Mitch! That's why! Having someone who can remember and talk about Kouta, Mai, and Kaito is a precious thing.

blocks.text: 俺も行くぜ。 戒斗。
blocks.translation: I'll go too, Kaito.

blocks.text: なんだよ! 他にはいない仲間っつーかさ だからさ! もう一度一緒に踊らないか? 俺たちと!
blocks.translation: What's that?! We're like friends like no other, so why don't you dance with us again? With us!

blocks.text: おい! また黙って消える気かよ。
blocks.translation: Hey! Are you just going to quietly disappear again?

blocks.text: おう……。
blocks.translation: Ou…….

blocks.text: アンタたちには任せておけねぇな!
blocks.translation: I can't leave it to you guys!

blocks.text: 俺たちは弱い。 だが、弱いからこそ強くなれる。 これまでも、これからも。
blocks.translation: We are weak. But it is because we are weak that we can become strong. That has always been the case, and will continue to be the case.

blocks.text: 俺はバロンの名前を汚すヤツを許すつもりはない。 ネオバロンは、俺が潰す。
blocks.translation: I have no intention of forgiving anyone who tarnishes the name of Baron. I will destroy Neo Baron.

blocks.text: 行くぜ!
blocks.translation: Let's go!

blocks.text: 今なら押し切れる!
blocks.translation: Now you can push through!

blocks.text: アザミさん。 何をやっていいか分からない俺に、ダンスを、夢を与えてくれたのは…。
blocks.translation: Azami-san. She gave me the dream of dancing when I didn't know what to do with myself.

blocks.text:
とうとうユグドラシルもなりふり構っていられなくなったな。 これで俺たちビートライダーズの疑いも···。
どうすんだよ…手に負えないぞ・・・。
blocks.translation: At last, Yggdrasil can no longer afford to be careless. Now suspicion is falling on us, the Beat Riders... What should we do... This is getting out of hand...

blocks.text: だから、絶対に助ける!
blocks.translation: So, I will definitely help!

blocks.text: 俺は絶対に負けない!
blocks.translation: I will never lose!

blocks.text: なめたマネしやがって…
blocks.translation: You're just kidding me...

blocks.text: 貴様がバロンだと? 笑わせるな。
blocks.translation: You're the Baron? Don't make me laugh.

blocks.text: 無駄話は後だ!
blocks.translation: No idle talk later!

blocks.text: 55 バロンの名前は、俺が守る! 変身!
blocks.translation: 55 I will protect the name of Baron! Transform!

blocks.text: いや、俺も行く。 舞まで攫われたとあっちゃ、黙っていられない。
blocks.translation: No, I'll go too. If Mai gets kidnapped too, I can't just stay quiet.

blocks.text: 卑怯者め。
blocks.translation: You coward.

blocks.text: どうしてなんだよ、 戒斗!
blocks.translation: Why is that, Kaito?

blocks.text: 戒斗の求めた強さは、 そんなもんじゃない! アイツが強さを求めたのは･･･。
blocks.translation: The strength that Kaito was looking for was not just that! What he was looking for in strength was...

blocks.text: 戒斗... お前その姿は...!
blocks.translation: Kaito... What do you look like...?

blocks.text: 今なら分かる。 アイツは･･･俺や、ペコや、お前! 弱いヤツらのために、
blocks.translation: Now I understand. He's... me, Peko, you! For the sake of the weak,

blocks.text: 戒斗ー! 本気なのか!? 本当に世界を滅ぼすつもりなのか!?
blocks.translation: Kaito! Are you serious? Are you really planning to destroy the world?

blocks.text: 世界を作り変えるために、強さを求めたんだ!
blocks.translation: I sought strength to reshape the world!

blocks.text: 戒斗、見ててくれ・・・!
blocks.translation: Kaito, watch out...!
I am...

blocks.text: 決めたぜ戒斗! 俺はお前について行く!
blocks.translation: I've decided, Kaito! I'll follow you!

blocks.text: 俺は戦い続ける。 チームバロンのため、戒斗の誇りを守るため、 そして俺は、俺の弱さを確かめるために戦う!
blocks.translation: I will keep fighting. For Team Baron, to protect Kaito's pride, and I will fight to ascertain my own weakness!

blocks.text: 加勢するぜ戒斗
blocks.translation: I'll help you, Kaito

blocks.text: なあ、戒斗、シュラにはあんな風に言っちまったが、 結局俺は･･･お前のことよく分からないんだ。
blocks.translation: Hey, Kaito, I may have said that to Shura, but in the end... I don't really understand you.

blocks.text: お前に勝ち目はない!
blocks.translation: You have no chance of winning!

blocks.text: 一番近くにいて、一番分かってるつもりだったんだけどな・・・。 大した確信もない。
blocks.translation: I thought I was closest and understood the most, but... I'm not entirely sure.

blocks.text: 今は退け...。
blocks.translation: Step back now...

blocks.text: ひとつ、聞いていいか。 どうしてあの時、 俺を殺さなかった。 殺せたはずだ。
blocks.translation: Can I ask you something? Why didn't you kill me back then? You could have killed me.

blocks.text: わりぃ、逃しちまった。
blocks.translation: Sorry, I missed it.

blocks.text: そうか。
blocks.translation: I see.

blocks.text: こいつを内緒で、シャルモンのおっさんに届けてくれ。 今はなにも聞くな。
blocks.translation: Please deliver this to the old man, Charmon, without telling anyone. Don't ask me anything now.

blocks.text: 踊ろうぜ。
blocks.translation: Let's dance.

blocks.text: 1 私は君のためにドライバーを作ってるんだぞ。
blocks.translation: 1 I'm making a screwdriver for you.

blocks.text: 4 私以外の発明など認めるものか!
blocks.translation: 4 I will not accept any inventions other than mine!

blocks.text: 全く、つまらない男だよ。
blocks.translation: What a boring guy.

blocks.text: 冗談はよしてくれ。 三流の分際で。
blocks.translation: Stop joking, you third-rate idiot.

blocks.text: 私を、庇ったのか･･･。
blocks.translation: Was he protecting me?

blocks.text: 彼は私の理解者では無かった。 それでも僕が認めた男だ。
blocks.translation: He wasn't someone who understood me, but he was still a man I respected.

blocks.text: 台灣
blocks.translation: Taiwan

blocks.text: 台灣
blocks.translation: Taiwan

blocks.text: . ほーらビンゴ。 それ、黒影トルーパーのドライバーでしょ。 やっぱ残ってんじゃん。
blocks.translation: . See, bingo. That's the Kurokage Trooper's driver. It's still there after all.

blocks.text: 好き勝手やってんじゃねえ!
blocks.translation: Don't do whatever you want!

blocks.text: 士ですから? ま、用心深いアンタのことだ。 必ず予備があると思ってたよ。
blocks.translation: You're a warrior, after all. Well, you're a cautious guy, so I knew you'd have a spare.

blocks.text: 初瀬ちゃん
blocks.translation: Hatsuse-chan

blocks.text: ・・・それ･･･貸してよ。 俺がアイツと戦う。
blocks.translation: ...Lend me that. I'll fight him.

blocks.text: うぉおおおおおおおおっ!
blocks.translation: Woooooooooo!

blocks.text: そんなこと言ったって、アンタ、前の傷まだ治ってないでしょ。 戦いは無理だ。
blocks.translation: Even if you say that, your previous wounds haven't healed yet. You can't fight.

blocks.text: あの初瀬ちゃんて・・・。
blocks.translation: That Hatsuse-chan...

blocks.text:
うるさい! 地獄のパティシエ修行に比べれば、このくらい・・・!
こんなところで…..。
blocks.translation:
Shut up! Compared to the hellish training to become a pastry chef, this is nothing...!
In a place like this...

blocks.text: 初瀬ちゃんがああなったのは・・・きっと俺のせいだよ。 だからこれは、俺の罪滅ぼしでもあるんだ。
blocks.translation: It's definitely my fault that Hatsuse-chan turned out like that. So this is also my way of atoning for my sins.

blocks.text: 別売りの武神鎧武フェイスプレートを取り付けた状態で、台詞ボタンを短押しします。 武神鎧武の台詞が下記リストの順に鳴ります。
blocks.translation: With the separately sold Bushin Gaim faceplate attached, press the dialogue button briefly. Bushin Gaim's dialogue will be played in the order listed below.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 台同
blocks.translation: Taitong

blocks.text: 運命の巫女を手に入れるのは失敗した。 だが実に強い武神ライダーだ。面白い。
blocks.translation: He failed to get the Maiden of Destiny, but he's a really strong warrior rider. Interesting.

blocks.text: どうしてもあの女が必要なのだ。
blocks.translation: I really need that woman.

blocks.text: 武神オーズ、打ち取ったり! 生きて帰すな!
blocks.translation: I've defeated the God of War OOO! Don't let him go alive!

blocks.text: ふははははははははは。
blocks.translation: Hahahahahahahaha.

blocks.text: お前たちをこの世界に呼んだのはこの私だ。 我が名は武神鎧武。 天下を手に入れる者だ。
blocks.translation: I am the one who called you to this world. My name is Bushin Gaim. I am the one who will rule the world.

blocks.text: まとめて相手をしてやる。
blocks.translation: I'll deal with them all at once.

blocks.text: 追うな! 武神の力は手に入れたのだから。
blocks.translation: Don't chase! You have obtained the power of the God of War.

blocks.text: 運命の巫女を渡せ。
blocks.translation: Give me the Shrine Maiden of Fate.

blocks.text: 異世界の武神か･礼を言うぞ。 ···その力も貰おうか!
blocks.translation: A war god from another world... I thank you. I'll take your power too!

blocks.text: 目障りだ。 消えろ!
blocks.translation: It's an eyesore. Get out!

blocks.text: 武神を失った武将に用は無い。 消えろ!
blocks.translation: There's no use for a warlord who has lost his god of war. Get out!

blocks.text: 邪魔をするな!
blocks.translation: Don't get in the way!

blocks.text: 逃げられたか。 だがこの世界の武神ライダーは全て打ち倒した。
blocks.translation: He managed to escape. However, he defeated all of the warrior riders of this world.

blocks.text: 忌々しい奴らめ、 私の本当の力を見せてやる。 でやあっ!
blocks.translation: Damn you, I'll show you my true power. And now!

blocks.text: 異世界の武神ライダーか。 その力も頂こう!
blocks.translation: A warrior rider from another world? Let's take his power!

blocks.text: 天下は、私の物だ!
blocks.translation: The world is mine!

blocks.text: 武神の力も集まった。 絶大な力を我が物にする時も近い!
blocks.translation: The power of the God of War has been gathered. The time to claim this immense power is near!

blocks.text: 我が力を甘くみた報いを受けろ!
blocks.translation: You will receive retribution for underestimating my power!

blocks.text: 後は運命の巫女を手に入れれば、 天下はこの手に!
blocks.translation: All that's left now is to obtain the destined shrine maiden and the world will be in your hands!

blocks.text: おお! 運命の巫女!
blocks.translation: Oh! Shrine Maiden of Fate!

blocks.text: 運命の巫女を渡してもらおう。 天守閣にいる女だ。
blocks.translation: I'll have you hand over the Shrine Maiden of Destiny. She's the woman in the castle tower.

blocks.text: 天下は･･･俺の物だぁーっ!
blocks.translation: The world is... mine!

blocks.text: 全ての武神を倒し、運命の巫女を手に入れる時、天下はこの手に。
blocks.translation: When I defeat all the war gods and obtain the shrine maiden of destiny, the world will be in my hands.

blocks.text: がああああああああああああああああああああああっ!
blocks.translation: GAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAHHHHHHHHHH!

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 1 私こそは真なる黄金の果実… 新世代の神だ。
blocks.translation: 1 I am the true Golden Fruit... the God of a new generation.

blocks.text: 私は究極の存在だ。 お前如きではどうすることもできんよ。
blocks.translation: I am the ultimate being. There is nothing you can do about me.

blocks.text: 今度こそ私は新たな世界の神となる!
blocks.translation: This time I will become the god of the new world!

blocks.text: 次の世界を創るのは私だ!
blocks.translation: I'm the one who will create the next world!

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: お前も黄金の果実の養分となるがよい!
blocks.translation: You too can become a nutrient for the golden fruit!

blocks.text:
何故だ! なぜ黄金の果実である私が、 貴様ごときに!
うわああああああ!
blocks.translation: Why! Why did you have to take me, the golden fruit!? Waaaaaaaah!

blocks.translation:
Jabu Faceplate (Sold Separately, Future Release)
With the Jabu Faceplate (sold separately) attached, briefly press the dialogue button. Kougane's lines will be played in the order listed below.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: ふっふっふ。 久しぶりだな。
blocks.translation: Hehehe. It's been a while.

blocks.text: これでもうお前たちに、 戦う術はあるまい。
blocks.translation: Now you have no way to fight back.

blocks.text: 私のことを忘れたか。
blocks.translation: Have you forgotten about me?

blocks.text: 呉島光実・・・。
blocks.translation: Mitsumi Kureshima...

blocks.text: 私だコウガネだ! ここまで力を取り戻すのに苦労したぞ!
blocks.translation: It's me, Kougane! It's been a struggle getting my strength back!

blocks.text: ふははははは、葛葉紘汰ならともかく、お前如きではどうすることもできんよ。
blocks.translation: Hahahaha, I could probably do something about it if it was Kazuraba Kouta, but there's nothing someone like you can do.

blocks.text: そうか、お前にとってあれは夢の中の出来事か。 だが私にとっては、耐え難い屈辱だ!
blocks.translation: Well, to you it was a dream, but to me it was an unbearable humiliation!

blocks.text: どこまでも楽しませてくれる。
blocks.translation: It's endlessly entertaining.

blocks.text: ふっ、無様な。 話にならん。 さあ、 狩りの時間といこうか。
blocks.translation: Ugh, how embarrassing. There's no point in talking. Now, let's go hunting.

blocks.text: 無駄なあがきだ。 消えろ!
blocks.translation: It's a futile struggle. Get out!

blocks.text: どうしたアーマードライダーども。 変身しないのか。
blocks.translation: What's wrong, Armored Riders? Why aren't you transforming?

blocks.text: いいのか。 この体は人間のものだぞ。 今の私はただ、このガキの体を乗っ取っているだけだ。
blocks.translation: Are you sure? This body belongs to a human. Right now, I'm just taking over this kid's body.

blocks.text: 決まっているだろ。 復讐だ!
blocks.translation: Of course. Revenge!

blocks.text: 武器を下ろせ。 変身を解け。ふふふははははははは。
blocks.translation: Put down your weapon. Undo the transformation. Hehehehahahahaha.

blocks.text: ふふふふっ。 はあっ!
blocks.translation: Hehehe. Aha!

blocks.text: バカな奴め。 じっくりといたぶってくれる。
blocks.translation: You idiot. I'll torture you slowly.

blocks.text: 簡単には楽にしてやらんぞ。 守ろうとしていたものが壊されるさまを、 その目に焼き付けろ。
blocks.translation: I won't let you off the hook that easily. Burn that into your eyes as you watch the very thing you were trying to protect being destroyed.

blocks.text: 安心しろ。 他の連中もすぐに後を追わせてやる。
blocks.translation: Don't worry, the others will follow shortly.

blocks.text: フェムシンムのように滅びるがいい。 猿どもめ。
blocks.translation: Perish like the Femsimms, you monkeys.

blocks.text: 21 おのれおのれおのれー! お前を消し去る!
blocks.translation: 21 Damn you, damn you! I'll wipe you out!

blocks.text: 雑魚が。 笑わせる。
blocks.translation: A small fry. Makes me laugh.

blocks.text: 何故黄金の果実である私が、 貴様如きに!
blocks.translation: How could I, the golden fruit, be subjected to the likes of you?

blocks.text: どうした。 ボロボロじゃないか。
blocks.translation: What's wrong? It's all worn out.

blocks.text: うわああああああああああっ!
blocks.translation: Waa ...

blocks.text: 12 よかろう。 変身。
blocks.translation: 12 Okay. Transform.

Demon Snake Faceplate (Sold Separately, Future Release)
With the separately sold Demon Snake Faceplate attached, briefly press the dialogue button. The Demon Snake's lines will be played in the order listed below.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 蛇とでも呼んでもらおう。
blocks.translation: You can call me a snake.

blocks.text: さあ、我がしもべとなれ。
blocks.translation: Come, become my servant.

blocks.text: 貴様らを現世に蘇らせてやる。 我が悲願を達成するためにな。
blocks.translation: I will bring you back to life in order to fulfill my long-cherished wish.

blocks.text: 来たか、新しい世界の王よ。
blocks.translation: Come, King of the New World.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 青き美しい星を手に入れる。
blocks.translation: Get a beautiful blue star.

blocks.text: 流石は、新しき、凄まじき力だ。 だが･･･フン!
blocks.translation: It's a new and awesome power, as expected. But... Hmph!

blocks.text: 貴様の力を頂くぞ!
blocks.translation: I'll take your power!

blocks.text: 貴様は完全に力を失った。 もう二度と戦えまい。 さあ、今こそ黄泉の扉を開くのだ!
blocks.translation: You have completely lost your power. You will never be able to fight again. Now is the time to open the gates of the underworld!

blocks.text: 台同
blocks.translation: Taitong

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 進撃の時は来た。 ゆけ! 我がしもべたちよ!
blocks.translation: The time to advance has come. Go! My servants!

blocks.text: 諦めろ!力の前にひれ伏せ!
blocks.translation: Give up! Bow before power!

blocks.text: 今こそ、この輝きに満ちた星・命溢れる楽園をわが手に!フハハハハハ、ハーッハッハッハッハッハ!
blocks.translation: Now is the time to take this shining planet, this life-filled paradise, into my hands! Hahahahaha, hahahahahaha!

blocks.text: おのれーい貴様ら! 許さん!
blocks.translation: Damn you guys! I won't forgive you!

blocks.text: 思い出しても無駄だ。 私の名前は魔蛇。 この星を手に入れる者だ!
blocks.translation: There's no point in remembering. My name is Demon Snake. I am the one who will claim this planet!

blocks.text: 絶対に許さんぞー!
blocks.translation: I'll never forgive you!

blocks.text: お前に戦う力は残っていない。 力はすべて、この私が頂いたのだからな。
blocks.translation: You no longer have the strength to fight, for I have taken all the power.

blocks.text: そんなバカな、ありえない! 奇跡などあってたまるか!
blocks.translation: That's ridiculous, impossible! Miracles don't exist!

blocks.text: フハハハハハ、ここからは私のステージだ。
blocks.translation: Hahahaha, from here on it's my turn.

blocks.text: 信じたものだと･･･? そんなもの、無意味だということを教えてやる!
blocks.translation: You believe in something...? I'll show you that it's meaningless!

blocks.text: どうだ。 力を失った気分は。
blocks.translation: How do you feel about losing your power?

blocks.text: あと少しで・・・この楽園をわが手に収められたものを・・・! 手に入らないのであれば・・・消し去る!
blocks.translation: Soon... I will have this paradise in my hands...! If I cannot have it... I will destroy it!

blocks.text: 力なき王は、消えるのみ!
blocks.translation: A king without power will only disappear!

blocks.text: お前さえいなければ･･･。 消えろ!
blocks.translation: If only you weren't here... Get lost!

blocks.text: 今のお前に何が出来る!
blocks.translation: What can you do now?

blocks.text: 何故だ・・・。 すべて上手く行っていた筈なのに･･･。
blocks.translation: Why... Everything was going well...

blocks.text: 終わりだ!
blocks.translation: It's over!

blocks.text: ほざくなァー!
blocks.translation: Don't talk nonsense!

blocks.text: まさか･･･この私がぁー・・・ ぐわあああああっ!
blocks.translation: It can't be... me... Gwaaaaah!

blocks.text: 18 おのれ、そんなことをして、タダで済むと思うな!
blocks.translation: 18 You bastards, don't think you can get away with doing that!

3. Briefly press the dialogue button.
Kōdō Kōkai's lines will be played in the order listed below.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: 戦極凌馬･･･。
blocks.translation: Sengoku Ryoma...

blocks.text: 戦極凌馬、 あなたが私を導いたのだ。 更なる世界へと。
blocks.translation: Sengoku Ryoma, you have led me to a new world.

blocks.text: 我々は黒の菩提樹。 あまねく世界を救う者である。
blocks.translation: We are the Black Bodhi Tree, the saviors of the world.

blocks.text: 呉島天樹氏の命令により、 ロックシードの起動実験に参加した私は、あの日死んだ。 少なくとも人間としては。
blocks.translation: Following the orders of Amatsuki Kureshima, I participated in the Lockseed activation experiment, and that day I died. At least as a human being.

blocks.text: 世界の終わりが近づいている。 我々がもたらす救済を、受け入れるのだ。
blocks.translation: The end of the world is near. Accept the salvation we bring.

blocks.text: しかし、肉体を失った私は、より高位の存在に生まれ変わった。 私の目的は復讐ではない。
blocks.translation: However, having lost my physical body, I have been reborn as a higher being. My goal is not revenge.

blocks.text: 久し振りだな、 戦極凌馬。
blocks.translation: It's been a while, Sengoku Ryoma.

blocks.text: あなたを試すことだ。 そして、確信した。
blocks.translation: It's to test you, and I'm convinced.

blocks.text: 私はあなたを導きに来た。 神へと至る世界へと。 だがそのためには、試練を乗り越えなければならない。
blocks.translation: I have come to guide you to the world that leads to God, but to do so you must pass a test.

blocks.text: 私は全てを失い、力を得た。 あなたはどうだ? 戦極凌馬。 あなたは神へと至る資格があるのか。
blocks.translation: I lost everything and gained power. What about you, Sengoku Ryoma? Are you worthy of becoming a god?

blocks.text:
私と共に来い、 戦極凌馬。 私は神となり世界を救済する。 そのためにはあなたの力が必要だ。
あなたの目的は神を生み出すことだ。 私ならそれを叶えることができる。
blocks.translation:
Come with me, Sengoku Ryoma. I will become a god and save the world. To do so, I need your power.
Your goal is to create a god. I can make that happen.

blocks.text: 私はそれを見極めなければならない。 神の力を手にして、世界を救うために。
blocks.translation: I must find out, to seize the power of God and save the world.

blocks.text: 呉島貴虎には無理なことだ。
blocks.translation: This is something that Takatora Kureshima cannot do.

blocks.text: 流石だ。 戦極凌馬。
blocks.translation: As expected from Sengoku Ryoma.

blocks.text: 戦極凌馬アー!
blocks.translation: Sengoku Ryoma Ah!

blocks.text:
私の目に狂いは無かった。 世界を救うためには、やはりあなたの力が必要なんだ。
いいだろう。 これが最後の試練だ。
blocks.translation:
My eyes were not mistaken. In order to save the world, I still need your help.
Very well. This is the final test.

blocks.text: 私を滅ぼすことはできない。 あなたなら理解できるはずだ。
blocks.translation: You can't destroy me, you can understand that.

blocks.text: はああっ・・・バカな･･･。
blocks.translation: Ahh...that's stupid...

blocks.text: 私は神に至り･･･世界を救うのだ･･･。
blocks.translation: I will reach God and save the world.

blocks.text: さあ、かかってこい。
blocks.translation: Come on, bring it on.

※直前に鎧武フェイスプレートを装着していた場合のみ、ゲネシスコア装着状態で
効果音ボタンを押すと、下記音声が鳴ります。
blocks.translation: *Only if you have previously equipped the Gaim Faceplate, pressing the sound effect button while the Genesis Core is equipped will play the following sound.

blocks.text:
紘汰・闇 「そうだ、すべて無駄だった。 戒斗を見ろ、ミッチを見ろ。
どいつもこいつも争い傷つけることしか考えてない。
そんな連中のために戦って何になる。 こんな世界はぶっ壊して、
イチからすべて創り直すそのための黄金の果実だ。
だからさ・・・俺たちももう、諦めちまおうぜ...。」
blocks.translation:
Kouta and Yami: "That's right, it was all for nothing. Look at Kaito, look at Mitch.
Everyone, they're all thinking of nothing but fighting and hurting others.
What's the point of fighting for people like that?
This world is a golden fruit that we need to destroy,
and start over from scratch.
So... let's just give up now too..."

blocks.translation:
Briefly press the button on the back of the Lockseed. 
→Two different versions of Kouta's "Transform!" voice will alternate.

blocks.text:
ロックシードの背面ボタンを長押しします。
長押しするたびに、効果音とともに、下記のモードに順番に遷移します。
モードによって開錠時の音声や変身音が異なります。
blocks.translation:
Press and hold the button on the back of the Lockseed.
Each time you press and hold, you will transition through the modes listed below in order, along with a sound effect.
The unlocking sound and transformation sounds will differ depending on the mode.

1st time: "Battle start sound" will play. 2nd time: "Game end sound" + random "YOU WIN" or "YOU LOSE" will play.

blocks.text: 気をつけて。 あなたは、運命を選ぼうとしている。
blocks.translation: Be careful, you are choosing your destiny.

blocks.text: この先に踏み込めば、もう二度と、後戻りはできない。
blocks.translation: If you step forward this far, there's no turning back.

blocks.text:
7 でも私は、紘汰にそうなってほしくないから、この力を受け入れたの。
そうだね。 紘汰はいつもそうだった。 そんな紘汰だから私、 信じられた。
blocks.translation:
7 But I didn't want that to happen to Kouta, so I accepted this power. 
That's right. Kouta has always been like that. That's why I was able to believe in him.

blocks.text: スイカ!
blocks.translation: Watermelon!

blocks.text: ヨロイモード!
blocks.translation: Armor Mode!

blocks.text: 最後まで、戦い続けることになる。 世界を、己の色に染め上げるまで。
blocks.translation: He will continue to fight until the end, until he has painted the world in his own color.

blocks.text: 紘汰、わかって･･･。違う･･･違うの!もっと別の言葉を!
blocks.translation: Kouta, I understand... No... No! Use other words!

blocks.text:
・・そう、確かに未来は決まっていない。 戒斗が全てを変えてしまうのかも。
戒斗は紘汰とは違う未来を見ている。
blocks.translation: ...Yes, it's true that the future isn't decided. Kaito might change everything. Kaito sees a different future than Kouta.

blocks.text: ジャイロモード!
blocks.translation: Gyro mode!

blocks.text: 大玉モード!
blocks.translation: Big ball mode!

blocks.text: 紘汰・・ごめん紘汰、 私には、 運命を変えられなかった････。
blocks.translation: Kouta... I'm sorry Kouta, I couldn't change my fate...

blocks.text: 二人の未来が交わることは決して無い。 だからもう･･･。
blocks.translation: Our futures will never intersect. So...

blocks.text: カチドキ!
blocks.translation: Click!

blocks.text: 紘汰、ミッチ、斗、誰にも傷ついて欲しく無かった。
blocks.translation: I didn't want anyone to get hurt - Kouta, Mitch, Tou.

blocks.text: 本当にこれでいいの? あなたと戒斗が戦うなんて
blocks.translation: Is this really okay? You and Kaito fighting?

blocks.text: カチドキ旗取り出し効果音
blocks.translation: Clicking flag removal sound effect

blocks.text: みんなボロボロになって苦しんでるのに、私はただ見てるだけ・・。
blocks.translation: Everyone was in terrible condition and suffering, and I just watched...

blocks.text: 紘汰・・・私、戒斗を止められなかった。
blocks.translation: Kouta...I couldn't stop Kaito.

blocks.text: 全部終わってしまう。何もかも、無駄になってしまう。
blocks.translation: It'll all be over. Everything will be wasted.

blocks.text: そう約束したじゃない。
blocks.translation: That's what I promised.

blocks.text: それがどういう意味だか分かってるの!?私はもう人間じゃない・・
blocks.translation: Do you know what that means?! I'm not human anymore...

blocks.text: 一緒なら何も怖くない。 どんなに苦しくても、きっと私達は乗り越えていける。
blocks.translation: If we're together, there's nothing to be afraid of. No matter how hard it gets, we can overcome it.

blocks.text: 私と一緒になるってことは、紘汰は!
blocks.translation: If you're going to be with me, then Kouta!

blocks.text: うん。行こう、紘汰。
blocks.translation: Yeah. Let's go, Kouta.

変身音を鳴らさないロックシードの装着方法

戦極ドライバーのブレードを動かすと、 「変身音」が鳴らずに最初から
必殺技音が鳴ります。

How to equip a Lockseed without playing the transformation sound
If the Lockseed's lid is open when it's attached to the Sengoku Driver,
when you move the Sengoku Driver's blade, the "transformation sound" will not be played,
and the special move sound will play from the start.

blocks.translation: *By selecting "Lock-on sound effect without voice" in "Lock-on sound selection" and then equipping a Lockseed in this state, you can recreate the sequence of equipping a Lockseed to your belt after using a weapon special move.

blocks.text: 台詞
blocks.translation: lines

blocks.text: これがアンタの望んだ結末か。
blocks.translation: Is this the ending you wanted?

blocks.text: 前にも言ったぞ。 お前なんかただの金メッキだ。行くぞ、ミッチ。
blocks.translation: I told you before, you're just gold plated. Let's go, Mitch.

blocks.text: アンタが敵なのか、味方なのか、俺には最後までわからなかった。
blocks.translation: I never knew until the very end whether you were an enemy or an ally.

blocks.text: その様子だと、もう大丈夫みたいだな。言った通りだろう。もう一度やり直せるって。
blocks.translation: It looks like you're okay now. I told you, you can try again.

blocks.text: ここまで世界をめちゃくちゃにしておいて。
blocks.translation: You've messed up the world to this extent.

blocks.text: 貴虎と仲良くな。 あと姉ちゃんに、俺は元気だって伝えといてくれ。
blocks.translation: Get along with Takatora. And tell my sister I'm doing well.

blocks.text:
これは世界を塗り潰す力。俺が守ろうとしたもの全てが犠牲になる。 冗談じゃない。 お断りだ。
ここで未来が無いのなら、別の世界を探せばいい。 諦めない限り道はある。
blocks.translation:
This is a power that will paint the world over. It will sacrifice everything I tried to protect. No way. No.
If there is no future here, then I can just look for another world. As long as I don't give up, there is always a way.

blocks.text: 俺たち、いつまでも仲間だぜ。 ミッチ。
blocks.translation: We'll always be friends, Mitch.

blocks.text: じゃあな。 駆紋・・・戒斗。 舞 俺達も自分の未来に、進もう。
blocks.translation: See you later. Kumon...Kaito. Mai: Let's move forward into our own futures too.

blocks.text: この宇宙の果て。 まだ誰にも知られていないどこでもない場所。
blocks.translation: The edge of the universe. A place no one knows yet.

blocks.text: この世界を守るのは俺だけじゃない。 みんなの思いがこの世界を創っていく!
blocks.translation: I'm not the only one who protects this world. Everyone's thoughts create this world!

blocks.text: そして、俺が望む未来の在り処だ。この世界を滅ぼして支配するよりも、
blocks.translation: And this is the future I desire. Rather than destroying and ruling this world,

blocks.text: それがひとつになれば、どんな困難だって絶対に乗り越えることができるんだ。
blocks.translation: If we can come together, we can overcome any difficulty.

blocks.text: 新たな世界を一から創り出す。 これが俺達の、新しいステージだ。
blocks.translation: Creating a new world from scratch. This is our new stage.

blocks.text: 魔蛇!この世から去れ! くらえー!
blocks.translation: Demon snake! Get out of this world! Take this!

blocks.text: 世界を望むがままに塗り替える・・・その力が俺のものなら、どんな闇も恐れない。
blocks.translation: Repainting the world however I wish... If that power were mine, I wouldn't fear any darkness.

blocks.text: 舞は返してもらうぞ!
blocks.translation: I'll give you back your dance!

blocks.text: 大丈夫さ。俺はひとりじゃない。
blocks.translation: It's okay. I'm not alone.

blocks.text: 俺は絶対に諦めない!
blocks.translation: I will never give up!

blocks.text: いつだって未来は闇の中だ。 だからこそ、 光を灯しに行く価値がある。
blocks.translation: The future is always dark. That's why it's worth going out and lighting the light.

blocks.text: ここからは俺のステージだ。
blocks.translation: From here on, it's my stage.

blocks.text: アンタはただ見守るだけ・・・だろ?
blocks.translation: You just watch over them...right?

blocks.text: 待たせたな。 みんな。
blocks.translation: Sorry to have kept you waiting, everyone.

blocks.text: 世話になったな。 さあ、行こう。
blocks.translation: Thank you for your help. Let's go.

blocks.text: このチャンスが来ると信じていたぜ!
blocks.translation: I believed this opportunity would come!

blocks.text: そんなことねえよミッチ。 お前、 すげえ頑張ったじゃねえか。
blocks.translation: No way, Mitch. You did a great job.

blocks.text: 貴虎!ミッチ! 行くぜ!
blocks.translation: Takatora! Mitch! Let's go!

blocks.text: やり残したことがあってな。コウガネ、 お前を倒すことだ。
blocks.translation: There's one thing I still have left to do: defeat you, Kougane.

blocks.text: 俺は仮面ライダー鎧武 ･･･ なんだろう、わかりやすく言ったら、 今は宇宙の神様、か?
blocks.translation: I'm Kamen Rider Gaim... how can I put it simply, I'm the God of the Universe now?

blocks.text: 行けるかミッチ。ふたりでアイツをやっつけよう。
blocks.translation: Go ahead, Mitch. Let's beat him together.

blocks.text: そうだな。一緒に戦おう。
blocks.translation: That's right. Let's fight together.

blocks.text: 変身。
blocks.translation: Transformation.

blocks.text: みんなバラバラで違うからこそ、一人では気付かない新しい可能性が生まれるんだ。
blocks.translation: Because we are all different and individual, new possibilities arise that we would not notice on our own.

blocks.text: ここからは、 俺達のステージだ。
blocks.translation: From here on, it's our stage.

blocks.text: 完全じゃなくていい。俺は互いを認めて、手を取り合う未来を選ぶ!
blocks.translation: It's okay if we don't become perfect. I choose a future where we accept each other and hold hands!
